nasb.text: that I may know Him and the power of His resurrection and the fellowship of His sufferings, being conformed to His death;

esv.text: that I may know him and the power of his resurrection, and may share his sufferings, becoming like him in his death,

cnv.text: 使我認識基督和他復活的大能，並且在他所受的苦上有分，受他所受的死；

ccb.text: 我渴望认识基督和祂复活的大能，与祂一同受苦，甚至到死的地步，

csbs.text: 并且为要认识基督和他复活的大能，要在他的苦难里相契合，效法他的死，
